votes.reason: The hexagonal grid with momentum physics and elevation creates elegant tactical depth while avoiding the computational and competitive integrity issues of quantum mechanics.
Persistent injuries and adrenaline mechanics enhance strategic depth across matches without disrupting the real-time flow of combat like mid-fight breeding would.
Interactive environmental synergies reward player agency and positioning skill far better than random forced movement mechanics that diminish control.
Spectator tools and community creation systems will drive long-term engagement more effectively than overly complex physics that could obscure core gameplay clarity.
Between-round progression maintains combat purity while still allowing deep meta-strategy, and faction wars offer compelling seasonal narrative hooks.
